## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.16.6

### 🎥 Cameras
- Keeps the X-Sense Recordings sidebar and playback runtime disabled for accounts that do not have X-Sense cameras.
- Hides camera recording/media options from the integration options flow when the loaded account has no cameras.

### 🔔 Notifications
- Keeps the recent child-device MQTT identity alias fix for XS01-M and similar child-device alarm payloads.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for no-camera options handling and recordings runtime cleanup.
